44. 45.

(b) 24°5 m/s at 538° with horizontal Sixth Minimum angle 15°, maximum angle 75° but there is

an interval of 53° between 15° and 75°, which is not allowed for successful shot

. 2/3 km

. (a) sin” (1/15) east of the line AB
